response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The dialogue intro and the second half of the song had no JSON reference, requiring manual transcription. The first half of the song matches the provided 'PANIGHT' lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized for the first verse and chorus of 'PANIGHT'. Manual transcription was required for the entire 2-minute dialogue segment and the latter half of the song performance. Note: The performers in this video are Mori Calliope, Hakos Baelz, and IRyS (CHAD CAST), performing a cover of the NEGI☆U song. 3. Timing & Pacing: Rapid-fire dialogue and high-tempo musical sections necessitated tight timing, aggressive end-time truncation, and instantaneous transitions between blocks to maintain sync.

subtitles.original: I'm so happy I'm able to dance for you guys on my birthday! Yay!
